description: Create an NPS survey titled 'Q4 2024 Customer Experience NPS Survey' in LimeSurvey (admin/Admin123!). The survey must include an 'NPS Rating' group with a mandatory 0-10 scale question named 'NPS' and an equation question named 'NPSCat' that classifies scores as 'Detractor' (0-6), 'Passive' (7-8), or 'Promoter' (9-10). Include a 'Follow-Up Feedback' group with three conditional Long Free Text questions: 'DetractorQ' (shown only for Detractors: "We're sorry to hear that. What was the primary reason for your low score?"), 'PassiveQ' (shown only for Passives: "Thank you for your feedback. What one improvement would make you rate us higher?"), and 'PromoterQ' (shown only for Promoters: "That's great to hear! What do you value most about our product/service?"). Configure the survey settings to anonymize responses and activate the survey upon completion.
